positive: A stylized, minimalist illustration of a wise forest spirit sitting cross-legged among bioluminescent glowing flora. The spirit should have clean, elegant lines and subtle Nordic or ethereal aesthetic influences, portrayed in a deep emerald and sapphire palette contrasted by bright, gentle gold accents. Focus on dramatic silhouettes and intricate, repeating patterns in the foliage, suggesting cosmic energy. Composition must be centered and balanced, perfect for a repeatable textile print. High contrast, engraved etching style, flat graphic design, studio lighting, centered, vector art.
negative: blurry, messy, watermark, text, logo, signature, copyright, messy background, low detail, artifacts, extra limbs, bad anatomy, grayscale, photorealistic, oil painting
